name: dev.whyknot.core
description: Shared Editor-only utilities for the WhyKnot VRChat tools: themed IMGUI styling (WhyKnot + VRCFury presets) with NDMF-ErrorReport-shaped scope logging, per-package file logger with session retention, hot-reload watcher (covers Packages/ as well as Assets/), path/mesh/blendshape/avatar/folder/undo helpers, reflection cache + GlobalObjectId helpers, EditorApplication.update ticker, typed EditorPrefs wrapper, WkToolWindow + WkInspectorEditor base classes, UIElements walkers. Bundled into dev.whyknot.avatar-qol and dev.whyknot.vrcfury-qol via the sync-to-downstream script; the standalone package is optional and primarily useful for the upcoming log viewer / settings provider UIs.
